reviews.comment:
Excelente atención! La nafta esta más barata! Un poco caro el Shop (una bebida isotonica q en el resto de estaciones esta $2700,me la cobraron $3700).

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! Gas is cheaper! The shop is a bit expensive (an isotonic drink that costs $2700 at other stations, they charged me $3700).

reviews.comment:
Excelente como todas las YPF,y felicitaciones,por qué a la hora de almorzar y/o cenar encuentro comidas sin tacc!!!💓💓❤️

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, like all YPF stations, and congratulations! Because at lunchtime and/or dinnertime I can find gluten-free options!!! 💓💓❤️

reviews.comment:
No pudimos hospedarnos en el hotel por falta de disponibilidad pero la atención de las chicas del bufetes a la hora de desayunar excelente  da gusto desayunar con tan buena onda

(Translated by Google)
We couldn't stay at the hotel due to lack of availability, but the service from the buffet staff at breakfast was excellent; it was a pleasure to have breakfast with such a friendly atmosphere.

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion pero lamentablemente siempre hay mucha demora, tanto para cargar combustible como para el shop. Las habitaciones estan muy buenas pero mas caras que el resto del alojamiento disponible en la zona.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, but unfortunately there are always long waits, both for fuel and at the shop. The rooms are very nice but more expensive than other accommodations in the area.
